name: Savory Quinoa Breakfast Cups
method: Place the quinoa in a sieve and rinse well. In a small saucepan, combine quinoa and 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons water. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce to a simmer. Cook for 10 to 15 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed. Remove from the heat and let set with the cover on for 5 minutes. Remove the lid and fluff.
Place paper muffin cups in a six-cup muffin tin.
Place spinach and mushrooms in a food processor and process until finely chopped.
Add all the ingredients to a large bowl and mix well.
Divide the mixture between muffin cups. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
